sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95290" key="skulakokto/nos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκῠλᾰκο-κτόνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n95290.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dog-killing</tr_>, Glycon ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:10:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
